required_complexity_patterns.notes: Fields inside a shadow DOM host or declarative shadow root
Fields inside details/summary or hidden until click
Multiple controls sharing name attribute groups (checkbox/radio clusters)
Field labeled via aria-labelledby pointing at hidden or distant span
Custom text field: div with role=textbox and contenteditable, no native input

reference_templates.notes: Label without for wraps input three div levels deep

Ashby yes no

Are you authorized to work in this country?

prompt_summary: Create a messy, production-real ashby-style job application (single-page, small, tier=high). Widgets: combobox. Required: Fields inside a shadow DOM host or declarative shadow root Required: Fields inside details/summary or hidden until click Required: Multiple controls sharing name attribute groups (checkbox/radio clusters) Required: Field labeled via aria-labelledby pointing at hidden or distant span Required: Custom text field: div with role=textbox and contenteditable, no native input Reference DOM (Deep wrapped label): Label without for wraps input three div levels deep Reference DOM (Lever custom file button): Lever-inspired resume upload with visible custom button hiding native input Reference DOM (Ashby yes no buttons): Ashby-inspired yes/no as two styled buttons instead of native radio Do NOT produce a tutorial-style form where every field is label[for]+native input. Mix native controls with non-semantic production DOM from the patterns below. Implement ALL required complexity patterns: shadow-host, details-accordion, duplicate-name-attrs, aria-labelledby-hidden, div-role-textbox. Include at least one custom widget (div role=textbox, pill buttons, or listbox combobox). Include at least one labeling strategy besides label-for (aria-label, aria-labelledby, glued spans, placeholder-only). Layout: definition list dl/dt/dd label pairs. Avoid generic centered SaaS card as the only structure. High tier: include shadow DOM host OR iframe apply shell OR wizard/conditional reveal with hidden fields. Mirror structural messiness like these references: Deep wrapped label; Lever custom file button; Ashby yes no buttons.
